description: Composition Blue printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin neck with a slit neckline, pin tucks along the slit neckline and on the chest, three-quarter sleeves with pleated piping on the cuffs and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash in cold water Dry clean only Classic patterning on contemporary styles by aneri creates this kurta for women. Timelessly chic, this piece will never go out of style. Wear it with tonal leggings and pumps for ethnic glam or with form fitting denims and flats for a casual do. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
